metadata.description: OSS Model Graph Break Corpus — torch.compile fullgraph=True compatibility for HuggingFace Transformers and Diffusers models
metadata.methodology: For each model: create with default config, run eager forward pass, then torch.compile(model, fullgraph=True, backend="eager"). Both eval and train modes tested.

dynamic_mark_sweep.description: mark_dynamic on batch (dim 0) + seq_len (dim 1 for NLP)
